PLAYGROUND DASH
Elementary Technology · Building 3D playground…
PLAYGROUNDDASH

Tell us who you are and dash through a school year in a busy playground!

The top five scores each month win prizes — we have staff room treats, boxes of glue sticks and lots more to give away!

If you'd prefer not to share your email address, we're happy to call your school instead if you're a winner.

Good luck! 🏃

Change
Full name
School name
Email (optional, private — never shown)

How to Play

1
The playground rushes toward you in full 3D — dodge what's coming!
2
← → Arrow keys or swipe left/right to change lane.
3
↑ Space / swipe up to jump over low obstacles.
4
Watch out for surprise school events — Ofsted, SATs Police and more!
